meta.title: DEF CON 30 - Car Hacking Village vol. 1
meta.description:
Silk gets the lowdown on the Truck portion of Car Hacking Village.

Check out Silk's work at YouTube.com/alexchaveriat and YouTube.com/hackerhangouts
